name: qqconnect_users
comment: Mapping table between MediaWiki users and QQ Connect OpenIDs. Each MediaWiki user can be bound to at most one QQ account, and each QQ OpenID (per APPID) can be bound to at most one MediaWiki user.

columns.name: qqc_user
columns.comment: MediaWiki user_id of the bound account.

columns.name: qqc_openid
columns.comment: QQ Connect OpenID (per-app unique identifier of the QQ user).

columns.name: qqc_appid
columns.comment: QQ Connect APPID that was used when this binding was established. Stored so a future APPID change does not silently repurpose bindings.

columns.name: qqc_nickname
columns.comment: QQ nickname at bind time, for display only.

columns.name: qqc_avatar
columns.comment: QQ avatar URL at bind time, for display only.

columns.name: qqc_bound_timestamp
columns.comment: Timestamp when the binding was created (MediaWiki BINARY(14) format).

indexes.name: qqc_openid_appid
indexes.comment: Ensures a QQ OpenID/APPID pair is bound to at most one MediaWiki user.
